title: coelogyne quisumbingiana
intro: Coelogyne quisumbingiana, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to the Philippines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coelogyne quisumbingiana include the potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. The herbal preparations of the plant typically involve boiling the roots and leaves in water to create a tea or infusion that can be used to treat various ailments.
